mapper.select:
select lf.lost_found_id, lf.title, lf.image_url, lf.category, lf.location, lf.create_time, u.username as user_name from lost_found lf left join user u on lf.user_id = u.user_id
and (lf.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or lf.description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or lf.location like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and lf.category = #{category}
order by lf.create_time desc

select lf.lost_found_id, lf.title, lf.description, lf.image_url, lf.category, lf.location, lf.contact, lf.create_time, lf.user_id, u.username as user_name from lost_found lf left join user u on lf.user_id = u.user_id where lf.lost_found_id = #{id}
